title: Maven Local-Repository Provenance Manifest
description: The PROJECT-determined set of artifacts written to the Maven local repository during a build, as produced by the provenance extension (see design.md). Everything written to the local repository that is NOT listed here is IMPLICIT by definition. This document must be canonical: projectArtifacts sorted by (groupId, artifactId, version, type, classifier), each entry's files sorted, UTF-8/LF, no timestamps or run-specific data, so that two builds of the same project on any Maven 3.9.x release produce byte-identical output.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Bump on any breaking change to this schema.

projectArtifacts.description: Sorted list of the PROJECT-determined artifacts. May be empty (a project whose entire footprint is Maven-implicit).

version.description: The resolved version actually present in the local repository.

type.description: Artifact type / packaging (e.g. jar, pom, war). For a coordinate present only as a POM (e.g. a parent POM), use "pom".

classifier.description: Optional artifact classifier (e.g. sources, javadoc). Omit when absent.

files.description: Repository-relative POSIX paths of every file belonging to this artifact that is part of the PROJECT set (primary file, .pom, checksum sidecars). Sorted. No leading slash; forward slashes only.
